caption.text:
My FIRST Youtube FanFest🥹❤️ 
•
I haven’t performed on a stage since my school annual days. When the YT team asked me if I would be interested to perform at Youtube Fan Fest - my first reaction was “what will I do on stage?” & they said - you say Yes and we’ll figure the Rest. 
If you know me - you know I don’t dance. I am very uncomfortable creating dance content too, and this was me dancing on the stage in front of thousands. But the cue to every good act is confidence and that’s all I had. Confidence in my journey, confidence that I belong here & confidence that my audience GOT ME. What I witnessed from the stage last night was pure joy, so many of my #SarahSquad were in the audience and it blew my mind that this is ALL REAL?! Someone pinch me. 
So grateful for everyone & everything🥹❤️
Thankyou @aasthamalhotra1 for making this happen for me! Thankyou @youtubeindia for always being a platform where we can be our most authentic selves! & thankyou to my core team @sherinsajii @amit_dey_photography @anirbandasraj and @juveriahhhhh._ for hustling alongside me! 💘
•
{ gratitude, youtube fanfest, fanfest 2025, youtuber, indian youtuber }

stardust on my skin, dreams in my stride✨
•
My red carpet moment at @festivaldecannes with @brut.india for the premiere of the movie Eddington 🎞️
•
•
For my outfit I wanted something inspired by the galaxies 🌌 & take a bold twist on the traditional silhouette of a saree✨ I also only wanted to work with Indian Labels representing India on the global level in every way. 
It’s iconic that I worked with @kalkifashion for my first red carpet moment as my first ever saree wore abroad was also by them🥹
We worked together for 2 months straight to bring this vision to life & I felt like my most bold, beautiful self on the carpet🎶
•
What an honour to be at the premiere and share the same carpet & theatre as Emma stone, Joaquin Phoenix, Angelina Jolie & so many icons 😍
•
•
•
•
#cannes2025 #Eddingtonpremiere #SarahinCannes #CannesFilmFestival

The journey to self-acceptance isn’t always easy especially when the world tells you to change parts of yourself that make you you.
For years, I believed my curls needed to be fixed. Today, I see them for what they are a reflection of roots my individuality and my confidence. 💛

Here’s to embracing every curl, every wave, every part of our story with pride. 🌼 @doveindiachannel 

#Ad #ReclaimYourCurls #DoveXTaapsee #DoveIndia #DovePartner #DoveHair #SelfAcceptance #LoveYourCurls
An update by our founder on the fire in the warehouse & next steps ahead.

A message from our founder for our Impulse Hustlers💛
The Impulse Coffees your trust in is currently rebuilding & we won’t compromise on quality or break your trust ever.
Please be patient with us and shop on @amazondotin or @letsblinkit (only in Mumbai) till stocks last🫶🏽
This is a setback & not a full stop in our journey & we truly are overwhelmed by your love and support in these hard times🤍💌
•
•
•
•
{ warehouse fire, crisis aversion, problem solving, impulse coffees, solo founder, startup awareness}

We’ve lost everything, except our resolve to come back stronger💔
A fire broke out in our master warehouse last night — while we’re beyond grateful that our team is safe, we’ve lost all our stored inventory and packing material.
It’s hard to see months of work, love, and coffee disappear in hours, but if there’s one thing the Impulse family knows — it’s how to bounce back. ☕💪
We’re working tirelessly to rebuild operations and will update you on dispatch timelines very soon.
Your patience, understanding, and every small act of kindness will help us rebuild stronger than ever.
Thank you for being part of our journey — this cup might be spilled, but the hustle never stops 💛
- love & a heavy heart, Sarah.

Ep.3 of Tall Girl Hunt for Denim 💙
Tried out @uniqloin this time, and their denim did not disappoint. 

- Baggy Curve Jeans – high-rise, comfy, and super flattering for tall frames.
- JWA Straight Jeans – timeless, structured, and just the right length 🙌
- 
Both styles tick all the boxes for fit + quality, so these are definitely #SarahApproved 💯

Tell me which one of these styles did you like the most ⬇️
